content: Client prefers bullet-point summaries over prose.

keyFindings: Risk teams are treating agent rollouts as a model-risk problem.
EU AI Act provisions for high-risk use cases take effect 2026-08-02.

data.recommendation: Schedule a joint session with Compliance before the August 2 deadline.

content: Briefing complete. 2 findings surfaced; 1 recommendation issued. Confidence is medium pending confirmation from Compliance.
